title: Change Tab Validation
description: **Superseded:** workflow and validation status (blockers, next action, lifecycle, artifact checks from `getChangeStatus`) are shown on **Change Tab Overview** (`ui:change-tab-overview`), not as a separate tab.
context: **Superseded:** workflow and validation status (blockers, next action, lifecycle, artifact checks from `getChangeStatus`) are shown on **Change Tab Overview** (`ui:change-tab-overview`), not as a separate tab.

rules: The change tab strip MUST NOT include a **Validation** tab. Status and validation workflow data MUST render inside Overview under a workflow section.

Overview MUST satisfy the former validation-tab polling rules: while Overview is visible, call `getChangeStatus` with `ifModifiedSince`, respect `unchanged`, pause when hidden, and refetch after save.

scenarios.name: Change tab strip omits Validation
given: an active change is open in the center panel
then: tabs are Overview, Artifacts, Tasks, Events, Context, and Coverage only
AND no Validation tab is shown

scenarios.name: Workflow status visible on Overview
given: Overview is the active change tab
when: getChangeStatus returns blockers or next action
then: Overview shows a workflow section with that data
AND switching to another tab does not require opening Validation
